title: Elytra (Allay)
description: Changes the elytra textures to look like the Allay's wings.
body:
## Elytra (Allay)
This resource pack changes the elytra textures to look like the Allay's wings.

_If you want to support us and our work, please consider checking out [our similar resource packs](https://modrinth.com/collection/prg8c7yg) or all of [our resource packs](https://modrinth.com/organization/vanilla-collective)!_

<details>
<summary>Installation</summary>

To install this resource pack, select your Minecraft version in the download menu, and copy the downloaded file into Minecraft's `resourcepacks` folder. Alternatively, if you are using the [Modrinth App](https://modrinth.com/app), you can easily add this resource pack to an instance by selecting "Install with Modrinth App" in the download menu.

For more detailed installation instructions, see the [Minecraft Wiki](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Tutorial:Loading_a_resource_pack).

</details>

<details>
<summary>Screenshots</summary>

![Screenshot 3 demonstrating Resource Pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zOYioT89/images/3f7c6eae5d32f7842725bfa0b810e2d43e7913fc.png)

</details>
